channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: Open-LLM-VTuber /Open-LLM-VTuber | Python | N/A
item.description: Talk to any LLM with hands-free voice interaction, voice interruption, and Live2D taking face running locally across platforms

item.title: supermemoryai /supermemory | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Memory engine and app that is extremely fast, scalable. The Memory API for the AI era.

item.title: stefan-jansen /machine-learning-for-trading | Jupyter Notebook | N/A
item.description: Code for Machine Learning for Algorithmic Trading, 2nd edition.

item.title: OpenBMB /VoxCPM | Python | N/A
item.description: VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning

item.title: reconurge /flowsint | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: A modern platform for visual, flexible, and extensible graph-based investigations. For cybersecurity analysts and investigators.

item.title: nesquena /hermes-webui | Python | N/A
item.description: Hermes WebUI: The best way to use Hermes Agent from the web or from your phone!

item.title: D4Vinci /Scrapling | Python | N/A
item.description: 🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!

item.title: affaan-m /ECC | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

item.title: microsoft /markitdown | Python | N/A
item.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

item.title: chopratejas /headroom | Python | N/A
item.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
